description_long: This is a large, modern cabin constructed primarily from wood with a dark, multi-level metal roof. The structure features several interconnected sections, including a main two-story block and multiple single-story wings, creating an L-shaped footprint. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light and views. A wooden deck with a circular hot tub is attached to one side, enhancing outdoor living space. The roofline is complex, with overlapping shed and gable forms, and several chimneys are visible, suggesting multiple fireplaces or stoves. The exterior combines natural wood siding with stone or concrete foundation elements, giving the cabin a contemporary yet rustic appearance.
description: A spacious, modern wooden cabin with a dark, multi-level roof, large windows, and a deck featuring a hot tub. The design blends rustic materials with contemporary architectural elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long wooden facade, several windows, and the main roof mass with a visible overhang.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the main entrance area, multiple roof levels, and a covered porch section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck with a circular hot tub, multiple rooflines, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing the L-shaped layout, two chimneys, and the integration of the deck with the main structure.
attribute_roof_type: multi-level shed and gable roof with deep overhangs, constructed from dark metal panels and featuring multiple chimneys
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical distribution of large and medium rectangular windows, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually across the facades
attribute_door_placement: main entrance door located on the front facade beneath a covered porch, with additional doors opening onto the deck area at the rear and side
